title: rubus × geniculatofragrans
intro: Rubus × geniculatofragrans, a hybrid of the Rubus genus, is a type of fragrant flowering raspberry bush. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among other health benefits. The fragrant flowers and leaves of Rubus × geniculatofragrans can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
